'''yayazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:micelle|micelle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:micelle|micelle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yayazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæyæzhæth|yæyæzhæth]] || [[word:yæyæzhæj|yæyæzhæj]] || [[word:yæyæzhæsh|yæyæzhæsh]] || [[word:yæyæzhæ|yæyæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yayayazhath|yayayazhath]] || [[word:yayayazhaj|yayayazhaj]] || [[word:yayayazhash|yayayazhash]] || [[word:yayayazha|yayayazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yayazhath|yayazhath]] || [[word:yayazhaj|yayazhaj]] || [[word:yayazhash|yayazhash]] || [[word:yayazha|yayazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yayafzhath|yayafzhath]] || [[word:yayafzhaj|yayafzhaj]] || [[word:yayafzhash|yayafzhash]] || [[word:yayafzhaf|yayafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yayazhatha|yayazhatha]] || [[word:yayazhaja|yayazhaja]] || [[word:yayazhasha|yayazhasha]] || [[word:yayazhaka|yayazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yayazhath|yayazhath]] || [[word:yayazhaj|yayazhaj]] || [[word:yayazhash|yayazhash]] || [[word:yayazha|yayazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yayazhathal|yayazhathal]] || [[word:yayazhajal|yayazhajal]] || [[word:yayazhashal|yayazhashal]] || [[word:yayazhakal|yayazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yayazhathatha|yayazhathatha]] || [[word:yayazhajaja|yayazhajaja]] || [[word:yayazhashasha|yayazhashasha]] || [[word:yayazhaka|yayazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yayazhathan|yayazhathan]] || [[word:yayazhajan|yayazhajan]] || [[word:yayazhashan|yayazhashan]] || [[word:yayazhakan|yayazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yayazhathaoro|yayazhathaoro]] || [[word:yayazhajaoro|yayazhajaoro]] || [[word:yayazhashaoro|yayazhashaoro]] || [[word:yayazhakaoro|yayazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
